svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="精力迁移" id="tr3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-136" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="before" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="转型前" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="360" x="60" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bexec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;" value="执行（敲代码）
约 80% 精力" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="300" x="90" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bdec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="决策
约 20%" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="300" x="90" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="after" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="转型后" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="360" x="560" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aexec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;" value="执行（交给 AI + 把关）
约 30% 精力" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="590" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="adec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;" value="决策（定义问题 / 设计系统 / 把控质量）
约 70% 精力" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="300" x="590" y="155" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="before" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="after" value="精力大头从执行挪到决策"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="总量没变少，变的是分配：AI 吃掉执行的量，人把腾出的精力全投到判断上。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="720" x="120" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=12;" value="自检：一天里「想」的时间是不是比「敲」的多。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="720" x="120" y="345" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
